package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerLazyLoadingEagerLoadOptionalConfig() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_load_optional_config"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Lazy loading. Flag optional configuration or metadata loaded at startup before any feature uses it."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
